concerns.detail: Deletion of substantive allegation about advisor '创总' threatening a student who rejected a summer research offer, replacing detailed account with empty content
concerns.excerpt: 楼上的能别洗地了吗。我亲眼见证本科同学拿了chuang gan和另外一位老板的暑研offer，最后没有选择chuang gan，你们的创总亲自下场威胁

concerns.detail: Unsupported personal insult and character attack using derogatory nickname and accusation of rumor-mongering
concerns.excerpt: 压抑哥每次造谣经典节目，不得不品

concerns.detail: Unsupported character judgment implying inherent moral deficiency of a student since high school
concerns.excerpt: 只能说她高中就能看出来..
